content: Anti-catabolic effects of ketones include attenuation of glycolysis, hepatic glucose output, and adipose tissue lipolysis.
Higher beta-hydroxybutyrate (BHB) levels in water-only fasting may prevent muscle loss greater than hypocaloric states without high ketone levels.
Peter Attia hosts _The Peter Attia Drive_ podcast, focusing on health, longevity, and applying principles of Medicine 3.0 to increase lifespan and healthspan.
Peter Attia's podcast includes detailed responses to subscriber questions, often on single topics, offering clarity and detail.
Peter Attia is the host of _The Peter Attia Drive_ and founder of _Early Medical_, a medical practice aiming to extend lifespan and increase healthspan.
Peter Attia discloses potential conflicts of interest and believes in transparency for those in positions of influence.
